headline: Wynn Resorts (WYNN) Stock Trades Down, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of luxury hotels and casino operator Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) fell 2.6% in the afternoon session after the renewed Iran-UAE flare-up sent oil prices sharply higher and revived fears of widespread summer travel disruption.
